name: Rye Bread with Beer & Orange
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all the ingredients.
2. Select white bread on your machine and press "Start."
Special Butter Recipe:
1. Mix 1 stick of sweet butter with 1 tbsp honey.
2. Add 2 tbsp Amaretto (or any sweet liqueur of your choice).
3. Stir in 1/4 tsp almond extract.
